## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is it needed?

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No tokens, credentials, private translation text, cache data, or identifying local paths are included.
- [ ] Loopback binding, authentication, sandbox, and tool restrictions remain intact or are explicitly reviewed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm.cmd run check`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Live Codex smoke test when App Server behavior changed, or an explanation of why it was not run.
